sequence.regex_raw:
@startuml

skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
skinparam roundcorner 5
skinparam maxmessagesize 250
skinparam responseMessageBelowArrow true
skinparam shadowing false

autoactivate on

actor "Client" as Client
participant "Department" as Department
participant "Student" as Student

note over Department
  Messages inferred from class associations
  (no CALLS data in CIR — diagram is approximate)
end note

note over Department
  No direct method call chains detected.
end note
@enduml
sequence.ai_raw:
@startuml

  skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
  skinparam roundcorner 5
  skinparam maxmessagesize 250
  skinparam responseMessageBelowArrow true
  skinparam shadowing false

...
@enduml

activity.ai_raw:
@startuml
  skinparam shadowing               false
  skinparam activityBorderColor     #000000
  skinparam activityBackgroundColor #ffffff
  skinparam activityFontColor       #000000
  skinparam activityFontSize        13
  skinparam arrowColor              #000000
  skinparam ActivityDiamondBorderColor #000000
  skinparam ActivityDiamondBackgroundColor #ffffff
  skinparam ActivityDiamondFontColor #000000

start

:Student.update_email(email: str);
:Department.update_name(name: str);

stop
@enduml
